# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build Artifacts
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      artifact_name: ${{ steps.set_artifact.outputs.artifact_name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set artifact name
        id: set_artifact
        run: echo "artifact_name=deployment-artifacts" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Build application
        run: |
          mkdir -p dist
          echo "build output" > dist/app.txt
          echo "deployment script" > dist/deploy.sh
          chmod +x dist/deploy.sh

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.set_artifact.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: dist/

  deploy_stage_one:
    name: Deploy to Stage One
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: build
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact_name }}
          path: artifacts

      - name: Execute deployment script
        run: |
          chmod +x artifacts/deploy.sh
          ./artifacts/deploy.sh

  deploy_stage_two:
    name: Deploy to Stage Two
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: deploy_stage_one
    steps:
      - name: Download build artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: deployment-artifacts
          path: artifacts

      - name: Execute deployment script
        run: |
          chmod +x artifacts/deploy.sh
          ./artifacts/deploy.sh
